description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and daily at 12:00 UTC. The workflow has three jobs: lint, build, and container. The lint job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.6, installs dependencies, and runs pyflakes and mypy. The build job uses a matrix strategy to test different environments, checks out the code, installs dependencies, builds the project, and runs tests. The container job builds and pushes Docker images to GitHub's Docker registry and tests fuzzers.
